creator: franco@opnsense.org
text:
Rafel, I looks like I misinterpreted https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/dns/py-dnspython2/Makefile?id=29d76ee75d83c1261bbf947c2d9564b2dac79079 because py-dnspython was bumped to version 2 instead and now the previous py-dnspython2 is the one that is going away.

Personally this looks rather silly from an early adopter standpoint of dns/py-dnspython2 redirecting back to dns/py-dnspython but it seems to be the way that it was decided...

It looks like we can wrap this up in the OPNsense ports then.


Cheers,
Franco
